name: Binary Search Tree Insert
description: Insert key into BST preserving order. Recursive: left if smaller, right if larger. O(h).
mermaid:
graph TD
    A1["BST root\nKey k"]
    D1{"root null?"}
    B1["Return new node k"]
    D2{"k less than root key?"}
    C1["root.left = Insert root.left k"]
    C2["root.right = Insert root.right k"]
    F1["Return root"]
    A1 --> D1
    D1 -->|Yes| B1
    D1 -->|No| D2
    B1 --> F1
    D2 -->|Yes: sequential AND| C1
    D2 -->|No: sequential AND| C2
    C1 --> F1
    C2 --> F1
    classDef red fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef yellow fill:#ffd43b,color:#000,stroke:#f59f00
    classDef green fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef lightblue fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef violet fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lavender fill:#e6e6fa,color:#333,stroke:#b19cd9
    class A1 red
    class B1,C1,C2 green
    class F1 violet
    class D1,D2 lavender
